summary: Recent updates to Firefox have introduced several important changes that enhance multimedia handling and audio management within the browser. The **implementation of the Picture-in-Picture API** allows users to watch videos in a small floating window while navigating other tabs, providing a more flexible viewing experience. Additionally, improvements to the audio processing pipeline, such as creating audio sinks and managing audio sessions, contribute to better sound output and resource management. These enhancements not only streamline the internal workings of multimedia components but also improve overall performance for users engaging with audio and video content online.
